description_long: This object is a tall, cylindrical can of juice, standing upright on a light-colored surface. The can features a dark, reddish-brown label with a pattern of fruit-like graphics, possibly berries or pomegranate, suggesting a mixed berry or similar juice flavor. Around the base of the can, a large, irregular pool of spilled juice is visible, with the liquid spreading outward in a natural, uneven pattern. The top of the can is metallic with a standard pull tab, and the can's body appears to be made of aluminum. The label is partially obscured by the spill and reflections, but no clear brand name or nutritional information is visible. The overall appearance suggests a recently opened or knocked-over can, commonly found in urban environments such as sidewalks or parks.
description: A tall aluminum can of juice with a dark, fruit-patterned label and a large pool of spilled reddish juice around its base.
description_view_0: The can is upright with a visible metallic pull tab and a prominent pool of spilled juice spreading out in front.
description_view_1: This side shows more of the label's fruit graphics and the spill, with a diagonal white streak on the can's surface.
description_view_2: The can's label appears darker and less detailed, with the juice spill forming a rounded shape around the base.
description_view_3: The back of the can is visible, showing more of the reddish label and the widest part of the juice spill.
